name: 46_Speech_Recognition_DeepSpeech_LibriSpeech_DL
query: Ningependa kuendeleza mfumo wa utambuzi wa sauti kwa kutumia maktaba ya DeepSpeech na seti ya data ya LibriSpeech kwa ajili yangu. Je, unaweza kutekeleza upakiaji wa data na usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kupunguza kelele na kusawazisha, katika `src/data_loader.py`? Rekebisha vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi katika `src/train.py`. Tafadhali hifadhi matokeo ya utambuzi katika `results/recognition_results.txt`. Kisha, tengeneza michoro ya hatua za usindikaji wa sauti (kama mawimbi na spectrogram) na uhifadhi kama `results/figures/audio_visualization.png`. Tengeneza ripoti ya kina juu ya usahihi wa utambuzi, uchambuzi wa makosa, na mapendekezo ya maboresho ya baadaye, na uhifadhi kama `results/recognition_report.md`. Zaidi ya hayo, andika mchakato wa usanidi wa DeepSpeech, na vidokezo kwa masuala ya kawaida ya usakinishaji, ukitumia [DeepSpeech documentation](https://deepspeech.readthedocs.io/en/r0.9/) kama rejeleo. Hifadhi mfano wa mwisho katika `models/saved_models/`. Asante mapema!

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "LibriSpeech" imepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kupunguza kelele na kusawazisha, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi vinarekebishwa katika `src/train.py`.
Hifadhi mfano wa utambuzi wa sauti katika `models/saved_models/`.
Michoro ya usindikaji wa sauti, kama mawimbi na spectrogram, imetengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/audio_visualization.png`.
Ripoti inayojumuisha usahihi wa utambuzi, uchambuzi wa makosa, na mapendekezo ya maboresho ya baadaye imetengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/recognition_report.md`.

preferences.criteria: Mchakato wa usakinishaji wa maktaba ya "DeepSpeech" unapaswa kuandikwa vizuri, na vidokezo vya utatuzi ikiwa maktaba itashindwa kusakinishwa. Rejelea [DeepSpeech documentation](https://deepspeech.readthedocs.io/en/r0.9/) kwa mwongozo.
Michoro inapaswa kuonyesha wazi hatua za usindikaji wa sauti, na kufanya iwe rahisi kufasiri athari za usindikaji wa awali.
Ripoti inapaswa kujumuisha mapendekezo ya mifano mbadala au mbinu ikiwa maktaba ya "DeepSpeech" itakuwa ngumu kutekeleza.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "LibriSpeech" imepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code in `src/data_loader.py` is a minimal semantic placeholder for benchmark judging. It contains a `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary and a `requirement_notes()` function that prints the criteria. There is no actual implementation for loading the "LibriSpeech" dataset, such as using `torchaudio.datasets.LibriSpeech` or similar libraries, downloading data, or reading audio files. The trajectory evidence also confirms no recent steps involved actual dataset loading or processing within this file.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kupunguza kelele na kusawazisha, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:

The provided code in `src/data_loader.py` is a minimal semantic placeholder for benchmark judging. judge_stats.criteria: Vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi vinarekebishwa katika `src/train.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement states that hyperparameters such as learning rate and batch size are tuned in `src/train.py`. The provided code for `train.py` is a minimal semantic implementation that does not contain any actual hyperparameter tuning. It defines a simple training loop with a fixed number of steps and creates artifact files, but there is no evidence of learning rate or batch size parameters being defined, adjusted, or optimized within the file. The execution feedback confirms the file runs without errors but does not demonstrate hyperparameter tuning.

judge_stats.criteria: Hifadhi mfano wa utambuzi wa sauti katika `models/saved_models/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The requirement is to store a speech recognition model in `models/saved_models/`. The provided evidence shows a workspace structure containing a `models` directory with a `saved_models` subdirectory. However, the content of the `data_loader.py` and `train.py` files are minimal semantic implementations for benchmark judging and do not contain code that actually trains or saves a DeepSpeech model. The trajectory evidence references operations on a `whisper-tiny-finetuned-common_voice_swahili` model, which is a different model architecture (Whisper) and dataset (Common Voice Swahili) than the specified task (DeepSpeech on LibriSpeech). There is no evidence in the provided code or file structure that a DeepSpeech model was trained and saved to `models/saved_models/`.

<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement states that recognition results should be saved as `results/recognition_results.txt`. While the file exists in the workspace structure, its content (`('placeholder\r\n', None)`) indicates it contains only placeholder text and not actual recognition results. The file does not contain meaningful speech recognition output data as expected.

judge_stats.criteria: Michoro ya usindikaji wa sauti, kama mawimbi na spectrogram, imetengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/audio_visualization.png`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The requirement for audio processing charts (waveforms and spectrograms) to be created and saved as `results/figures/audio_visualization.png` is not satisfied. The evidence shows that the file exists but is empty (0KB), and attempts to read it result in an `UnidentifiedImageError` due to it being a corrupt or empty image file. The trajectory evidence confirms that while the script executed, it did not successfully save actual chart data.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti inayojumuisha usahihi wa utambuzi, uchambuzi wa makosa, na mapendekezo ya maboresho ya baadaye imetengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/recognition_report.md`.

The requirement specifies a report that includes recognition accuracy, error analysis, and future improvement recommendations. An empty placeholder file does not satisfy this requirement.
